bullets: Collaborated with a Product Owner and senior engineering consultant to design a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system
Architected a server-side routing engine to dispatch **16** specialised agents based on pipeline state
Engineered modular agents with defined responsibilities, JSON state contracts, and turn-based execution controls
Reduced research-phase token usage by **60%** by integrating Tavily API
Implemented a parallel assembly phase with **5** concurrent agents
Designed an evidence-based validation layer to prevent unsupported or fabricated claims
Eliminated race conditions and reduced latency from LLM-based routing
Improved system throughput and reliability via modular design and parallel execution
Delivered structured programming instruction across multiple Melbourne schools (JavaScript, C, Java, Python)
Explained complex technical concepts to **12–20** students per session
Provided hands-on debugging and problem-solving support
Collaborated with educators and coordinators to deliver consistent learning experiences
Created a promotional video for the company website
Earned High Distinction for outstanding placement performance
Improved student comprehension and engagement across varying skill levels
Planned and delivered community programs engaging **500+** youth across Victoria
Led the Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference
Facilitated dialogue between youth and community elders on mental health
Engaged in grant writing and stakeholder engagement
Secured **$50,000** in government funding (**20%** above target)
Achieved a **4.5/5** satisfaction rating for the youth conference

style_overrides_applied: Past tense for all roles except current position
Use assertive action verbs — avoid passive voice and weak constructions
Bold numeric metrics and key results in work history bullets
Keep CV to 2 pages max — cut verbose phrasing and redundant responsibilities
Refine long bullets (over 18 words) for scan-speed readability
Impact-driven opening — lead with a specific achievement, not a generic application statement
